name: torii-sumo
description: Torii bundles a SUMO expert skill and local MCP tools for OSM-to-SUMO workflows.

interface.longDescription: Bundles a SUMO expert skill, bounded local stdio MCP tools, OSM-to-SUMO helpers, TLS audit candidates, routeability probes, and evidence-aware feedback diagnosis.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Torii to understand the SUMO task, run MCP tools only when evidence is needed, and treat bad metrics as model feedback.
